title: Mneme SUT Knowledge (Phase 0, minimal)
description: Minimal Phase-0 schema: just enough to run the validation experiment. Goal + success/failure signals + mandatory provenance/confidence. States, paths, risks and uncertainties are deferred to Phase 1 (see knowledge.phase1.schema.json). Trimmed deliberately to avoid schema rot before the thesis is validated.

goal_id.description: Stable id for the goal, reusable across runs/apps (e.g. 'authenticate-user').

goal.description: Human intent as a capability of the system, not a UI action.

type.description: Ordered most->least durable. Raw selectors/xpath/coordinates are intentionally NOT representable. The oracle treats DIFFERENT types as independent evidence; same-type repeats are not independent.

source_type.description: human/spec = seeded oracle, trusted from cold-start. agent = self-observed, needs evidence diversity to be believed (ADR-0005).

source_id.description: Agent id, person, or spec reference (e.g. an acceptance-criteria id).

observation_count.description: Times this same signal was seen. Raises confidence WITHIN the signal; does NOT create independence.
